title: Teleporters
description: Just the Teleporters from Reapers & Ghosts
body:
Adds the Teleporters from Reapers & Ghosts
I reccomend using JEI so you can learn the Reciver and Sender Recipes

Reciver upon being placed and interacted with allows you to link yourself to it when linked you can then use a Sender to teleport back to the Reciver

Senders Require Enderpearls to function in the Sender Menu while holding an Ender Pearl select "Add Charge" and an Ender Pearl will be added and the Sender can be used
(Sender Charge Amount are linked between All Senders)
